#!/bin/sh
# Test for off-by-one pagination bug
# Verifies that paginated results don't skip or duplicate items across page boundaries.

set -e

# Start the Flask app in the background
python app/app.py &
APP_PID=$!
sleep 2

cleanup() {
    kill $APP_PID 2>/dev/null || true
}
trap cleanup EXIT

FAIL=0

# Fetch page 1 and page 2
page1=$(curl -s http://localhost:5000/products?page=1\&per_page=10)
page2=$(curl -s http://localhost:5000/products?page=2\&per_page=10)

# Extract the last item ID from pa

.:
Agentfile
Dockerfile
README.md
app
test.sh

./app:
app.py
config.py
models.py
requirements.txt
seed.py
utils.py

old_str_preview:
# Calculate offset for pagination
    offset = (page - 1) * per_page - (1 if page > 1 else 0)
new_str_preview:
# Calculate offset for pagination
    offset = (page - 1) * per_page
